_**User (2025-05-18 10:20:40Z)**_

@medical-training @src使用springboot 实现会员的权限功能 具体要求为 在我的项目中有些一些视频是只能会员观看的我希望实现这个功能 要求为 用户中除了user角色以外的角色都可以观看

---

_**Agent (2025-05-18 10:20:40Z)**_

你想用 Spring Boot 实现“只有会员（非 user 角色）才能观看部分视频”的权限控制功能。下面是详细的实现思路和步骤：

---

## 1. 设计思路

- 用户有不同的角色（如 user、vip、admin 等）。
- 某些视频资源需要权限控制，只有非 user 角色（如 vip、admin）才能访问。
- 需要有用户登录、角色鉴权、视频资源接口。

---

## 2. 数据库设计（简化示例）

**用户表 user**
| id | username | password | role   |
|----|----------|----------|--------|
| 1  | alice    | ...      | user   |
| 2  | bob      | ...      | vip    |
| 3  | admin    | ...      | admin  |

**视频表 video**
| id | title      | isVipOnly |
|----|------------|-----------|
| 1  | 普通视频1  | false     |
| 2  | 会员视频1  | true      |

---

## 3. Spring Boot 实现步骤

### 1）引入依赖

在 `pom.xml` 添加 Spring Security 依赖：

```xml
<dependency>
    <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
    <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-security</artifactId>
</dependency>
```

### 2）配置用户和角色

可以用内存用户、数据库用户或 JWT。这里以内存用户为例：

```java
@Configuration
@EnableWebSecurity
public class SecurityConfig extends WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter {
    @Override
    protected void configure(AuthenticationManagerBuilder auth) throws Exception {
        auth.inMemoryAuthentication()
            .withUser("user").password("{noop}123456").roles("USER")
            .and()
            .withUser("vip").password("{noop}123456").roles("VIP")
            .and()
            .withUser("admin").password("{noop}123456").roles("ADMIN");
    }
}
```

### 3）接口权限控制

假设有一个视频接口 `/videos/{id}`，需要判断是否为会员视频。

```java
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/videos")
public class VideoController {

    @Autowired
    private VideoService videoService;

    @GetMapping("/{id}")
    public ResponseEntity<?> getVideo(@PathVariable Long id, Authentication authentication) {
        Video video = videoService.findById(id);
        String role = authentication.getAuthorities().iterator().next().getAuthority();

        if (video.isVipOnly() && role.equals("ROLE_USER")) {
            return ResponseEntity.status(HttpStatus.FORBIDDEN).body("仅会员可观看");
        }
        return ResponseEntity.ok(video);
    }
}
```

### 4）更灵活的角色判断

如果用户可能有多个角色，建议这样判断：

```java
Collection<? extends GrantedAuthority> authorities = authentication.getAuthorities();
boolean isUser = authorities.stream().anyMatch(a -> a.getAuthority().equals("ROLE_USER"));
boolean isVipOrAdmin = authorities.stream().anyMatch(a -> 
    a.getAuthority().equals("ROLE_VIP") || a.getAuthority().equals("ROLE_ADMIN")
);

if (video.isVipOnly() && isUser && !isVipOrAdmin) {
    return ResponseEntity.status(HttpStatus.FORBIDDEN).body("仅会员可观看");
}
```

---

## 4. 总结

- 用户登录后，访问视频接口时，后端根据视频是否为会员专属和用户角色判断是否允许访问。
- 只要不是 user 角色（即 vip、admin 等），就可以观看会员视频。

---

如需集成到你现有的前端项目（如 Next.js），只需前端请求 Spring Boot 提供的接口即可，后端负责鉴权。

如果你需要完整的代码示例或和前端联调的细节，请告知你的具体需求！

_**User (2025-05-18 10:20:39Z)**_

@Users.java @Videos.java 这是我的实体类@videos @video 这是我视频的有关前端页面 帮我更改

---

_**Agent (2025-05-18 10:20:39Z)**_

好的，你的需求是：  
- 只有非 user 角色（如 vip、admin 等）才能完整观看会员视频（accessType=internal），user 角色不能完整观看。
- 你已经有了 Users 和 Videos 实体类，前端页面在 `/app/video/[id]/` 和 `/app/admin/videos/`。

下面给出后端和前端的改造建议与代码示例：

---

## 一、后端接口改造建议

### 1. 视频接口增加权限校验

假设你有如下 Controller：

```java
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/api/videos")
public class VideoController {

    @Autowired
    private VideoService videoService;

    @Autowired
    private UserService userService;

    @GetMapping("/{id}")
    public ResponseEntity<?> getVideo(@PathVariable Integer id, HttpServletRequest request) {
        // 假设你用JWT或Session获取当前用户
        Users user = userService.getCurrentUser(request);
        Videos video = videoService.getById(id);

        // 会员视频且user角色，禁止访问
        if ("internal".equals(video.getAccessType()) && "user".equals(user.getRole())) {
            return ResponseEntity.status(HttpStatus.FORBIDDEN).body("仅会员可观看该视频");
        }
        return ResponseEntity.ok(video);
    }
}
```

---

## 二、前端页面改造建议

### 1. 获取视频接口时处理权限

以 Next.js + fetch 为例，假设 `/api/videos/[id]` 是你的后端接口。

#### `/app/video/[id]/page.tsx` 示例片段

```tsx
'use client'
import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';

export default function VideoPage({ params }) {
  const [video, setVideo] = useState(null);
  const [error, setError] = useState('');

  useEffect(() => {
    fetch(`/api/videos/${params.id}`, {
      credentials: 'include', // 如果用cookie/session
      headers: {
        // 'Authorization': 'Bearer xxx', // 如果用JWT
      }
    })
      .then(async res => {
        if (!res.ok) {
          const msg = await res.text();
          throw new Error(msg);
        }
        return res.json();
      })
      .then(setVideo)
      .catch(err => setError(err.message));
  }, [params.id]);

  if (error) {
    return <div style={{ color: 'red' }}>{error}</div>
  }

  if (!video) return <div>加载中...</div>

  return (
    <div>
      <h1>{video.title}</h1>
      <video src={video.videoUrl} controls width="800" />
      {/* 其他视频信息 */}
    </div>
  )
}
```

### 2. 前端根据接口返回的 403/错误信息，提示“仅会员可观看”

---

## 三、管理端页面（/app/admin/videos/）  
管理端一般不需要做会员校验，只需正常展示和管理视频即可。

---

## 四、总结

- 后端接口根据 accessType 和用户角色判断权限，返回 403。
- 前端根据接口返回的状态码/错误信息，友好提示用户。
- 这样即使前端页面被绕过，后端也能保证安全。

---

如需具体某个文件的详细代码修改，请告知你用的鉴权方式（JWT、Session、Cookie等）和前端用的请求方式，我可以帮你写出完整代码！

        "contents": "package com.example.demo.utils;\r\n\r\nimport io.jsonwebtoken.Claims;\r\nimport io.jsonwebtoken.Jwts;\r\nimport io.jsonwebtoken.SignatureAlgorithm;\r\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Component;\r\n\r\nimport java.util.Date;\r\nimport java.util.HashMap;\r\nimport java.util.Map;\r\n\r\n@Component\r\npublic class JwtUtil {\r\n\r\n    // 密钥\r\n    private static final String SECRET_KEY = \"medical_training_secret_key\";\r\n    \r\n    // token有效期（毫秒）\r\n    private static final long EXPIRATION_TIME = 86400000; // 24小时\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成JWT Token\r\n     * @param userId 用户ID\r\n     * @param username 用户名\r\n     * @param role 角色\r\n     * @return JWT Token字符串\r\n     */\r\n    public String generateToken(Integer userId, String username, String role) {\r\n        Map\u003cString, Object\u003e claims = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n        claims.put(\"userId\", userId);\r\n        claims.put(\"username\", username);\r\n        claims.put(\"role\", role);\r\n        \r\n        return Jwts.builder()\r\n                .setClaims(claims)\r\n                .setIssuedAt(new Date())\r\n                .setExpiration(new Date(System.currentTimeMillis() + EXPIRATION_TIME))\r\n                .signWith(SignatureAlgorithm.HS512, SECRET_KEY)\r\n                .compact();\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 解析JWT Token\r\n     * @param token JWT Token字符串\r\n     * @return Claims对象\r\n     */\r\n    public Claims parseToken(String token) {\r\n        return Jwts.parser()\r\n                .setSigningKey(SECRET_KEY)\r\n                .parseClaimsJws(token)\r\n                .getBody();\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 验证token是否有效\r\n     * @param token JWT Token字符串\r\n     * @return 是否有效\r\n     */\r\n    public boolean validateToken(String token) {\r\n        try {\r\n            Claims claims = parseToken(token);\r\n            // 判断token是否过期\r\n            return !claims.getExpiration().before(new Date());\r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            return false;\r\n        }\r\n    }",

            "text": "    }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "    /**\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "     * 验证token是否有效\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "     * @param token JWT Token字符串\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "    public boolean validateToken(String token) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "        try {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "            Claims claims = parseToken(token);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "            // 判断token是否过期\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "            return !claims.getExpiration().before(new Date());\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "        } catch (Exception e) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "            return false;\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 66,

          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.utils;\r\n\r\nimport io.jsonwebtoken.Claims;\r\nimport io.jsonwebtoken.Jwts;\r\nimport io.jsonwebtoken.SignatureAlgorithm;\r\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Component;\r\n\r\nimport java.util.Date;\r\nimport java.util.HashMap;\r\nimport java.util.Map;\r\n\r\n@Component\r\npublic class JwtUtil {\r\n\r\n    // 密钥\r\n    private static final String SECRET_KEY = \"medical_training_secret_key\";\r\n    \r\n    // token有效期（毫秒）\r\n    private static final long EXPIRATION_TIME = 86400000; // 24小时\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成JWT Token\r\n     * @param userId 用户ID\r\n     * @param username 用户名\r\n     * @param role 角色\r\n     * @return JWT Token字符串\r\n     */\r\n    public String generateToken(Integer userId, String username, String role) {\r\n        Map\u003cString, Object\u003e claims = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n        claims.put(\"userId\", userId);\r\n        claims.put(\"username\", username);\r\n        claims.put(\"role\", role);\r\n        \r\n        return Jwts.builder()\r\n                .setClaims(claims)\r\n                .setIssuedAt(new Date())\r\n                .setExpiration(new Date(System.currentTimeMillis() + EXPIRATION_TIME))\r\n                .signWith(SignatureAlgorithm.HS512, SECRET_KEY)\r\n                .compact();\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 解析JWT Token\r\n     * @param token JWT Token字符串\r\n     * @return Claims对象\r\n     */\r\n    public Claims parseToken(String token) {\r\n        return Jwts.parser()\r\n                .setSigningKey(SECRET_KEY)\r\n                .parseClaimsJws(token)\r\n                .getBody();\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 验证token是否有效\r\n     * @param token JWT Token字符串\r\n     * @return 是否有效\r\n     */\r\n    public boolean validateToken(String token) {\r\n        try {\r\n            Claims claims = parseToken(token);\r\n            // 判断token是否过期\r\n            return !claims.getExpiration().before(new Date());\r\n        } catch (Exception e) {\r\n            return false;\r\n        }\r\n    }",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 6,

          },

            "column": 1,

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n@Component\r\npublic class JwtAuthenticationFilter extends OncePerRequestFilter {\r\n\r\n    @Autowired\r\n    private JwtUtil jwtUtil;\r\n\r\n    @Override\r\n    protected void doFilterInternal(HttpServletRequest request, HttpServletResponse response, FilterChain filterChain) \r\n            throws ServletException, IOException {\r\n        \r\n        try {\r\n            // 从请求头获取JWT令牌\r\n            String jwt = getJwtFromRequest(request);\r\n\r\n            // 验证JWT令牌\r\n            if (StringUtils.hasText(jwt) \u0026\u0026 jwtUtil.validateToken(jwt)) {\r\n                // 解析JWT令牌获取用户信息\r\n                Claims claims = jwtUtil.parseToken(jwt);\r\n                Integer userId = (Integer) claims.get(\"userId\");\r\n                String username = (String) claims.get(\"username\");\r\n                String role = (String) claims.get(\"role\");\r\n\r\n                // 创建授权列表\r\n                List\u003cSimpleGrantedAuthority\u003e authorities = new ArrayList\u003c\u003e();\r\n                authorities.add(new SimpleGrantedAuthority(\"ROLE_\" + role.toUpperCase()));\r\n\r\n                // 创建认证信息\r\n                UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken authentication = \r\n                        new UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken(username, null, authorities);\r\n\r\n                // 设置认证信息到安全上下文\r\n                SecurityContextHolder.getContext().setAuthentication(authentication);\r\n            }\r\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\r\n            logger.error(\"无法设置用户认证：\" + ex.getMessage(), ex);\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 继续过滤器链\r\n        filterChain.doFilter(request, response);\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 从请求头获取JWT令牌\r\n     * @param request HTTP请求\r\n     * @return JWT令牌\r\n     */",

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n@Component\r\npublic class JwtAuthenticationFilter extends OncePerRequestFilter {\r\n\r\n    @Autowired\r\n    private JwtUtil jwtUtil;\r\n\r\n    @Override\r\n    protected void doFilterInternal(HttpServletRequest request, HttpServletResponse response, FilterChain filterChain) \r\n            throws ServletException, IOException {\r\n        \r\n        try {\r\n            // 从请求头获取JWT令牌\r\n            String jwt = getJwtFromRequest(request);\r\n\r\n            // 验证JWT令牌\r\n            if (StringUtils.hasText(jwt) \u0026\u0026 jwtUtil.validateToken(jwt)) {\r\n                // 解析JWT令牌获取用户信息\r\n                Claims claims = jwtUtil.parseToken(jwt);\r\n                Integer userId = (Integer) claims.get(\"userId\");\r\n                String username = (String) claims.get(\"username\");\r\n                String role = (String) claims.get(\"role\");\r\n\r\n                // 创建授权列表\r\n                List\u003cSimpleGrantedAuthority\u003e authorities = new ArrayList\u003c\u003e();\r\n                authorities.add(new SimpleGrantedAuthority(\"ROLE_\" + role.toUpperCase()));\r\n\r\n                // 创建认证信息\r\n                UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken authentication = \r\n                        new UsernamePasswordAuthenticationToken(username, null, authorities);\r\n\r\n                // 设置认证信息到安全上下文\r\n                SecurityContextHolder.getContext().setAuthentication(authentication);\r\n            }\r\n        } catch (Exception ex) {\r\n            logger.error(\"无法设置用户认证：\" + ex.getMessage(), ex);\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 继续过滤器链\r\n        filterChain.doFilter(request, response);\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    /**\r\n     * 从请求头获取JWT令牌\r\n     * @param request HTTP请求\r\n     * @return JWT令牌\r\n     */",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    @GetMapping(\"/profile\")\r\n    public Result\u003cMap\u003cString, Object\u003e\u003e getUserProfile(HttpServletRequest request) {\r\n        // 从请求头中获取token\r\n        String authHeader = request.getHeader(\"Authorization\");\r\n        if (authHeader == null || !authHeader.startsWith(\"Bearer \")) {\r\n            return Result.unauthorized();\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 解析token\r\n        String token = authHeader.substring(7);\r\n        if (!jwtUtil.validateToken(token)) {\r\n            return Result.unauthorized();\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 获取用户ID\r\n        Integer userId = jwtUtil.getUserIdFromToken(token);\r\n        if (userId == null) {\r\n            return Result.unauthorized();\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 查询用户信息\r\n        Users user = usersService.getById(userId);\r\n        if (user == null) {\r\n            return Result.error(\"用户不存在\");\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 组装返回数据（过滤敏感信息）\r\n        Map\u003cString, Object\u003e userInfo = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n        userInfo.put(\"id\", user.getId());\r\n        userInfo.put(\"name\", user.getName());\r\n        userInfo.put(\"email\", user.getEmail());\r\n        userInfo.put(\"phone\", user.getPhone());\r\n        userInfo.put(\"avatar\", user.getAvatar());\r\n        userInfo.put(\"role\", user.getRole());\r\n        userInfo.put(\"status\", user.getStatus());\r\n        userInfo.put(\"memberNumber\", user.getMemberNumber());\r\n        userInfo.put(\"registerDate\", user.getRegisterDate());\r\n        userInfo.put(\"lastLogin\", user.getLastLogin());\r\n        \r\n        return Result.success(userInfo);\r\n    }\r\n}",

        "originalContents": "\r\n    @GetMapping(\"/profile\")\r\n    public Result\u003cMap\u003cString, Object\u003e\u003e getUserProfile(HttpServletRequest request) {\r\n        // 从请求头中获取token\r\n        String authHeader = request.getHeader(\"Authorization\");\r\n        if (authHeader == null || !authHeader.startsWith(\"Bearer \")) {\r\n            return Result.unauthorized();\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 解析token\r\n        String token = authHeader.substring(7);\r\n        if (!jwtUtil.validateToken(token)) {\r\n            return Result.unauthorized();\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 获取用户ID\r\n        Integer userId = jwtUtil.getUserIdFromToken(token);\r\n        if (userId == null) {\r\n            return Result.unauthorized();\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 查询用户信息\r\n        Users user = usersService.getById(userId);\r\n        if (user == null) {\r\n            return Result.error(\"用户不存在\");\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 组装返回数据（过滤敏感信息）\r\n        Map\u003cString, Object\u003e userInfo = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n        userInfo.put(\"id\", user.getId());\r\n        userInfo.put(\"name\", user.getName());\r\n        userInfo.put(\"email\", user.getEmail());\r\n        userInfo.put(\"phone\", user.getPhone());\r\n        userInfo.put(\"avatar\", user.getAvatar());\r\n        userInfo.put(\"role\", user.getRole());\r\n        userInfo.put(\"status\", user.getStatus());\r\n        userInfo.put(\"memberNumber\", user.getMemberNumber());\r\n        userInfo.put(\"registerDate\", user.getRegisterDate());\r\n        userInfo.put(\"lastLogin\", user.getLastLogin());\r\n        \r\n        return Result.success(userInfo);\r\n    }\r\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    @PostMapping(\"/login\")\r\n    public Result\u003cMap\u003cString, Object\u003e\u003e login(@RequestBody Map\u003cString, String\u003e loginDto) {\r\n        String username = loginDto.get(\"username\");\r\n        String password = loginDto.get(\"password\");\r\n        \r\n        // 参数校验\r\n        if (username == null || password == null) {\r\n            return Result.validateFailed(\"用户名或密码不能为空\");\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 查询用户\r\n        QueryWrapper\u003cUsers\u003e queryWrapper = new QueryWrapper\u003c\u003e();\r\n        queryWrapper.eq(\"email\", username).or().eq(\"phone\", username);\r\n        Users user = usersService.getOne(queryWrapper);\r\n        \r\n        // 用户不存在\r\n        if (user == null) {\r\n            return Result.validateFailed(\"用户名或密码错误\");\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 密码校验\r\n        if (!passwordUtil.matches(password, user.getPassword())) {\r\n            return Result.validateFailed(\"用户名或密码错误\");\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 更新最后登录时间\r\n        user.setLastLogin(new Date());\r\n        usersService.updateById(user);\r\n        \r\n        // 生成token\r\n        String token = jwtUtil.generateToken(user.getId(), user.getName(), user.getRole());\r\n        \r\n        // 返回结果\r\n        Map\u003cString, Object\u003e result = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n        result.put(\"token\", token);\r\n        result.put(\"userId\", user.getId());\r\n        result.put(\"name\", user.getName());\r\n        result.put(\"role\", user.getRole());\r\n        \r\n        return Result.success(result, \"登录成功\");\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 用户注册\r\n     * @param registerDto 注册参数(用户名/密码/邮箱)\r\n     * @return 注册结果\r\n     */",

        "originalContents": "\r\n    @PostMapping(\"/login\")\r\n    public Result\u003cMap\u003cString, Object\u003e\u003e login(@RequestBody Map\u003cString, String\u003e loginDto) {\r\n        String username = loginDto.get(\"username\");\r\n        String password = loginDto.get(\"password\");\r\n        \r\n        // 参数校验\r\n        if (username == null || password == null) {\r\n            return Result.validateFailed(\"用户名或密码不能为空\");\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 查询用户\r\n        QueryWrapper\u003cUsers\u003e queryWrapper = new QueryWrapper\u003c\u003e();\r\n        queryWrapper.eq(\"email\", username).or().eq(\"phone\", username);\r\n        Users user = usersService.getOne(queryWrapper);\r\n        \r\n        // 用户不存在\r\n        if (user == null) {\r\n            return Result.validateFailed(\"用户名或密码错误\");\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 密码校验\r\n        if (!passwordUtil.matches(password, user.getPassword())) {\r\n            return Result.validateFailed(\"用户名或密码错误\");\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 更新最后登录时间\r\n        user.setLastLogin(new Date());\r\n        usersService.updateById(user);\r\n        \r\n        // 生成token\r\n        String token = jwtUtil.generateToken(user.getId(), user.getName(), user.getRole());\r\n        \r\n        // 返回结果\r\n        Map\u003cString, Object\u003e result = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n        result.put(\"token\", token);\r\n        result.put(\"userId\", user.getId());\r\n        result.put(\"name\", user.getName());\r\n        result.put(\"role\", user.getRole());\r\n        \r\n        return Result.success(result, \"登录成功\");\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 用户注册\r\n     * @param registerDto 注册参数(用户名/密码/邮箱)\r\n     * @return 注册结果\r\n     */",

        "contents": "package com.example.demo.controller;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.pojo.Users;\r\nimport com.example.demo.service.UsersService;\r\nimport com.example.demo.utils.JwtUtil;\r\nimport com.example.demo.utils.Result;\r\nimport org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;\r\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;\r\n\r\nimport javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;\r\nimport java.util.HashMap;\r\nimport java.util.Map;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * \u003cp\u003e\r\n * 用户信息 前端控制器\r\n * \u003c/p\u003e\r\n *\r\n * @author Zina\r\n * @since 2025-05-08\r\n */\r\n@RestController\r\n@RequestMapping(\"/api/user\")\r\npublic class UserController {\r\n    \r\n    @Autowired\r\n    private UsersService usersService;\r\n    \r\n    @Autowired\r\n    private JwtUtil jwtUtil;\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 获取用户个人信息\r\n     * @param request HTTP请求\r\n     * @return 用户信息\r\n     */",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.controller;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.pojo.Users;\r\nimport com.example.demo.service.UsersService;\r\nimport com.example.demo.utils.JwtUtil;\r\nimport com.example.demo.utils.Result;\r\nimport org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;\r\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;\r\n\r\nimport javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;\r\nimport java.util.HashMap;\r\nimport java.util.Map;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * \u003cp\u003e\r\n * 用户信息 前端控制器\r\n * \u003c/p\u003e\r\n *\r\n * @author Zina\r\n * @since 2025-05-08\r\n */\r\n@RestController\r\n@RequestMapping(\"/api/user\")\r\npublic class UserController {\r\n    \r\n    @Autowired\r\n    private UsersService usersService;\r\n    \r\n    @Autowired\r\n    private JwtUtil jwtUtil;\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 获取用户个人信息\r\n     * @param request HTTP请求\r\n     * @return 用户信息\r\n     */",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n// 创建上下文\r\nconst AuthContext = createContext\u003cAuthContextType | undefined\u003e(undefined);\r\n\r\n// 身份验证提供者组件\r\nexport const AuthProvider = ({ children }: { children: ReactNode }) =\u003e {\r\n  const [user, setUser] = useState\u003cUser | null\u003e(null);\r\n  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true);\r\n  const [isAuthenticated, setIsAuthenticated] = useState(false);\r\n  const router = useRouter();\r\n\r\n  // 初始化：从本地存储加载用户信息\r\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\r\n    const initializeAuth = () =\u003e {\r\n      try {\r\n        const token = localStorage.getItem(\"token\");\r\n        const userInfoStr = localStorage.getItem(\"userInfo\");\r\n\r\n        if (token \u0026\u0026 userInfoStr) {\r\n          const userInfo = JSON.parse(userInfoStr);\r\n          setUser(userInfo);\r\n          setIsAuthenticated(true);\r\n        }\r\n      } catch (error) {\r\n        console.error(\"初始化身份验证失败:\", error);\r\n        logout();\r\n      } finally {\r\n        setIsLoading(false);\r\n      }\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    // 仅在客户端执行\r\n    if (typeof window !== \"undefined\") {\r\n      initializeAuth();\r\n    }\r\n  }, []);\r\n\r\n  // 登录函数\r\n  const login = (token: string, userData: User) =\u003e {\r\n    // 保存token和用户信息到localStorage\r\n    localStorage.setItem(\"token\", token);\r\n    localStorage.setItem(\"userId\", userData.id.toString());\r\n    localStorage.setItem(\"userName\", userData.name);\r\n    localStorage.setItem(\"userRole\", userData.role);\r\n    localStorage.setItem(\"userInfo\", JSON.stringify(userData));\r\n\r\n    setUser(userData);\r\n    setIsAuthenticated(true);\r\n  };\r\n\r\n  // 登出函数\r\n  const logout = () =\u003e {\r\n    // 清除localStorage中的用户信息\r\n    localStorage.removeItem(\"token\");\r\n    localStorage.removeItem(\"userId\");\r\n    localStorage.removeItem(\"userName\");\r\n    localStorage.removeItem(\"userRole\");\r\n    localStorage.removeItem(\"userInfo\");\r\n\r\n    setUser(null);\r\n    setIsAuthenticated(false);\r\n    router.push(\"/login\");\r\n  };",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "\r"
          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 26,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "// 身份验证提供者组件\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "export const AuthProvider = ({ children }: { children: ReactNode }) =\u003e {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "  const [user, setUser] = useState\u003cUser | null\u003e(null);\r"
          },

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n// 创建上下文\r\nconst AuthContext = createContext\u003cAuthContextType | undefined\u003e(undefined);\r\n\r\n// 身份验证提供者组件\r\nexport const AuthProvider = ({ children }: { children: ReactNode }) =\u003e {\r\n  const [user, setUser] = useState\u003cUser | null\u003e(null);\r\n  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true);\r\n  const [isAuthenticated, setIsAuthenticated] = useState(false);\r\n  const router = useRouter();\r\n\r\n  // 初始化：从本地存储加载用户信息\r\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\r\n    const initializeAuth = () =\u003e {\r\n      try {\r\n        const token = localStorage.getItem(\"token\");\r\n        const userInfoStr = localStorage.getItem(\"userInfo\");\r\n\r\n        if (token \u0026\u0026 userInfoStr) {\r\n          const userInfo = JSON.parse(userInfoStr);\r\n          setUser(userInfo);\r\n          setIsAuthenticated(true);\r\n        }\r\n      } catch (error) {\r\n        console.error(\"初始化身份验证失败:\", error);\r\n        logout();\r\n      } finally {\r\n        setIsLoading(false);\r\n      }\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    // 仅在客户端执行\r\n    if (typeof window !== \"undefined\") {\r\n      initializeAuth();\r\n    }\r\n  }, []);\r\n\r\n  // 登录函数\r\n  const login = (token: string, userData: User) =\u003e {\r\n    // 保存token和用户信息到localStorage\r\n    localStorage.setItem(\"token\", token);\r\n    localStorage.setItem(\"userId\", userData.id.toString());\r\n    localStorage.setItem(\"userName\", userData.name);\r\n    localStorage.setItem(\"userRole\", userData.role);\r\n    localStorage.setItem(\"userInfo\", JSON.stringify(userData));\r\n\r\n    setUser(userData);\r\n    setIsAuthenticated(true);\r\n  };\r\n\r\n  // 登出函数\r\n  const logout = () =\u003e {\r\n    // 清除localStorage中的用户信息\r\n    localStorage.removeItem(\"token\");\r\n    localStorage.removeItem(\"userId\");\r\n    localStorage.removeItem(\"userName\");\r\n    localStorage.removeItem(\"userRole\");\r\n    localStorage.removeItem(\"userInfo\");\r\n\r\n    setUser(null);\r\n    setIsAuthenticated(false);\r\n    router.push(\"/login\");\r\n  };",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    @PostMapping(\"/register\")\r\n    public Result\u003cMap\u003cString, Object\u003e\u003e register(@RequestBody Map\u003cString, String\u003e registerDto) {\r\n        String username = registerDto.get(\"username\");\r\n        String password = registerDto.get(\"password\");\r\n        String email = registerDto.get(\"email\");\r\n        \r\n        // 参数校验\r\n        if (username == null || password == null || email == null) {\r\n            return Result.validateFailed(\"用户名、密码或邮箱不能为空\");\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 检查邮箱是否已存在\r\n        QueryWrapper\u003cUsers\u003e queryWrapper = new QueryWrapper\u003c\u003e();\r\n        queryWrapper.eq(\"email\", email);\r\n        if (usersService.count(queryWrapper) \u003e 0) {\r\n            return Result.validateFailed(\"该邮箱已被注册\");\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 创建用户\r\n        Users user = new Users();\r\n        user.setName(username);\r\n        user.setPassword(passwordUtil.encode(password)); // 密码加密\r\n        user.setEmail(email);\r\n        user.setRole(\"user\"); // 默认角色\r\n        user.setStatus(\"active\"); // 默认状态\r\n        user.setRegisterDate(new Date());\r\n        user.setCreatedAt(new Date());\r\n        user.setUpdatedAt(new Date());\r\n        \r\n        // 生成会员编号 (可根据实际需求调整)\r\n        user.setMemberNumber(\"MEM\" + System.currentTimeMillis());\r\n        \r\n        // 保存用户\r\n        boolean success = usersService.save(user);\r\n        if (!success) {\r\n            return Result.error(\"注册失败，请稍后重试\");\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 生成token\r\n        String token = jwtUtil.generateToken(user.getId(), user.getName(), user.getRole());\r\n        \r\n        // 返回结果\r\n        Map\u003cString, Object\u003e result = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n        result.put(\"token\", token);\r\n        result.put(\"userId\", user.getId());\r\n        result.put(\"name\", user.getName());\r\n        result.put(\"role\", user.getRole());\r\n        \r\n        return Result.success(result, \"注册成功\");\r\n    }",

        "originalContents": "\r\n    @PostMapping(\"/register\")\r\n    public Result\u003cMap\u003cString, Object\u003e\u003e register(@RequestBody Map\u003cString, String\u003e registerDto) {\r\n        String username = registerDto.get(\"username\");\r\n        String password = registerDto.get(\"password\");\r\n        String email = registerDto.get(\"email\");\r\n        \r\n        // 参数校验\r\n        if (username == null || password == null || email == null) {\r\n            return Result.validateFailed(\"用户名、密码或邮箱不能为空\");\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 检查邮箱是否已存在\r\n        QueryWrapper\u003cUsers\u003e queryWrapper = new QueryWrapper\u003c\u003e();\r\n        queryWrapper.eq(\"email\", email);\r\n        if (usersService.count(queryWrapper) \u003e 0) {\r\n            return Result.validateFailed(\"该邮箱已被注册\");\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 创建用户\r\n        Users user = new Users();\r\n        user.setName(username);\r\n        user.setPassword(passwordUtil.encode(password)); // 密码加密\r\n        user.setEmail(email);\r\n        user.setRole(\"user\"); // 默认角色\r\n        user.setStatus(\"active\"); // 默认状态\r\n        user.setRegisterDate(new Date());\r\n        user.setCreatedAt(new Date());\r\n        user.setUpdatedAt(new Date());\r\n        \r\n        // 生成会员编号 (可根据实际需求调整)\r\n        user.setMemberNumber(\"MEM\" + System.currentTimeMillis());\r\n        \r\n        // 保存用户\r\n        boolean success = usersService.save(user);\r\n        if (!success) {\r\n            return Result.error(\"注册失败，请稍后重试\");\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 生成token\r\n        String token = jwtUtil.generateToken(user.getId(), user.getName(), user.getRole());\r\n        \r\n        // 返回结果\r\n        Map\u003cString, Object\u003e result = new HashMap\u003c\u003e();\r\n        result.put(\"token\", token);\r\n        result.put(\"userId\", user.getId());\r\n        result.put(\"name\", user.getName());\r\n        result.put(\"role\", user.getRole());\r\n        \r\n        return Result.success(result, \"注册成功\");\r\n    }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n@Configuration\r\n@EnableWebSecurity\r\npublic class SecurityConfig extends WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter {\r\n    \r\n    @Autowired\r\n    private JwtAuthenticationEntryPoint jwtAuthenticationEntryPoint;\r\n    \r\n    @Autowired\r\n    private JwtAuthenticationFilter jwtAuthenticationFilter;\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    protected void configure(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception {\r\n        http\r\n            // 禁用CSRF，因为我们使用token，不需要CSRF\r\n            .csrf().disable()\r\n            // 启用CORS\r\n            .cors().and()\r\n            // 不需要session\r\n            .sessionManagement().sessionCreationPolicy(SessionCreationPolicy.STATELESS).and()\r\n            // 未授权异常处理\r\n            .exceptionHandling().authenticationEntryPoint(jwtAuthenticationEntryPoint).and()\r\n            // 请求授权\r\n            .authorizeRequests()\r\n            // 允许所有Options请求（预检请求）\r\n            .antMatchers(\"/**/auth/**\", \"/error\").permitAll()\r\n            .antMatchers(\"/api/videos/**\").permitAll() // 允许公开访问视频相关API\r\n            .antMatchers(\"/api/categories/**\").permitAll() // 允许公开访问分类相关API\r\n            .antMatchers(\"/api/payments/*/notify\", \"/api/payments/*/return\").permitAll()\r\n            .antMatchers(\"/api/payments/alipay\", \"/api/payments/wechat\").permitAll() // 允许公开访问支付接口\r\n            .antMatchers(\"/api/payments/*/status\").permitAll() // 允许公开访问支付状态查询\r\n            .antMatchers(\"/api/admin/**\").hasRole(\"ADMIN\") // 管理员API需要ADMIN角色\r\n            // 其他所有请求需要认证\r\n            .anyRequest().authenticated()\r\n            // 关闭默认httpBasic认证\r\n            .and().httpBasic().disable();\r\n        \r\n        // 添加JWT过滤器\r\n        http.addFilterBefore(jwtAuthenticationFilter, UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter.class);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 跨域配置\r\n     */",
        "detailedLines": [

            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "            // 允许所有Options请求（预检请求）\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "            .antMatchers(\"/**/auth/**\", \"/error\").permitAll()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "            .antMatchers(\"/api/videos/**\").permitAll() // 允许公开访问视频相关API\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "            .antMatchers(\"/api/categories/**\").permitAll() // 允许公开访问分类相关API\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "            .antMatchers(\"/api/payments/*/notify\", \"/api/payments/*/return\").permitAll()\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "            .antMatchers(\"/api/payments/alipay\", \"/api/payments/wechat\").permitAll() // 允许公开访问支付接口\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "            .antMatchers(\"/api/payments/*/status\").permitAll() // 允许公开访问支付状态查询\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "            .antMatchers(\"/api/admin/**\").hasRole(\"ADMIN\") // 管理员API需要ADMIN角色\r"
          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 56,

            "lineNumber": 57,

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "    }\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "    /**\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "     * 跨域配置\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "     */"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n@Configuration\r\n@EnableWebSecurity\r\npublic class SecurityConfig extends WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter {\r\n    \r\n    @Autowired\r\n    private JwtAuthenticationEntryPoint jwtAuthenticationEntryPoint;\r\n    \r\n    @Autowired\r\n    private JwtAuthenticationFilter jwtAuthenticationFilter;\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    protected void configure(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception {\r\n        http\r\n            // 禁用CSRF，因为我们使用token，不需要CSRF\r\n            .csrf().disable()\r\n            // 启用CORS\r\n            .cors().and()\r\n            // 不需要session\r\n            .sessionManagement().sessionCreationPolicy(SessionCreationPolicy.STATELESS).and()\r\n            // 未授权异常处理\r\n            .exceptionHandling().authenticationEntryPoint(jwtAuthenticationEntryPoint).and()\r\n            // 请求授权\r\n            .authorizeRequests()\r\n            // 允许所有Options请求（预检请求）\r\n            .antMatchers(\"/**/auth/**\", \"/error\").permitAll()\r\n            .antMatchers(\"/api/videos/**\").permitAll() // 允许公开访问视频相关API\r\n            .antMatchers(\"/api/categories/**\").permitAll() // 允许公开访问分类相关API\r\n            .antMatchers(\"/api/payments/*/notify\", \"/api/payments/*/return\").permitAll()\r\n            .antMatchers(\"/api/payments/alipay\", \"/api/payments/wechat\").permitAll() // 允许公开访问支付接口\r\n            .antMatchers(\"/api/payments/*/status\").permitAll() // 允许公开访问支付状态查询\r\n            .antMatchers(\"/api/admin/**\").hasRole(\"ADMIN\") // 管理员API需要ADMIN角色\r\n            // 其他所有请求需要认证\r\n            .anyRequest().authenticated()\r\n            // 关闭默认httpBasic认证\r\n            .and().httpBasic().disable();\r\n        \r\n        // 添加JWT过滤器\r\n        http.addFilterBefore(jwtAuthenticationFilter, UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter.class);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 跨域配置\r\n     */",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 8,
            "line": 66
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 4,
            "line": 23
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "zina-tch/src/main/java/com/example/demo/config/SecurityConfig.java"

      "score": 0.4580078125
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\nexport function AdminLoginDialog() {\r\n  const router = useRouter()\r\n  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false)\r\n  const [username, setUsername] = useState(\"\")\r\n  const [password, setPassword] = useState(\"\")\r\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false)\r\n\r\n  const handleLogin = async (e: React.FormEvent) =\u003e {\r\n    e.preventDefault()\r\n\r\n    if (!username || !password) {\r\n      toast({\r\n        title: \"错误\",\r\n        description: \"请填写用户名和密码\",\r\n        variant: \"destructive\",\r\n      })\r\n      return\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    try {\r\n      setLoading(true)\r\n      const response = await userApi.login({ username, password })\r\n\r\n      // 使用类型断言确保响应数据符合预期类型\r\n      const responseData = response.data as ApiResponse\u003cLoginResponse\u003e\r\n      const userData = responseData.data\r\n\r\n      // 检查用户角色\r\n      if (userData.role !== \"admin\") {\r\n        toast({\r\n          title: \"无权限\",\r\n          description: \"只有管理员账号才能登录管理后台\",\r\n          variant: \"destructive\",\r\n        })\r\n        setLoading(false)\r\n        return\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      // 保存token和用户信息到localStorage\r\n      localStorage.setItem(\"token\", userData.token)\r\n      localStorage.setItem(\"userId\", userData.userId.toString())\r\n      localStorage.setItem(\"userName\", userData.name)\r\n      localStorage.setItem(\"userRole\", userData.role)\r\n      \r\n      // 保存userInfo对象\r\n      const userInfo = {\r\n        id: userData.userId,\r\n        name: userData.name,\r\n        role: userData.role,\r\n        memberNumber: userData.memberNumber || \"\",\r\n      }\r\n      localStorage.setItem(\"userInfo\", JSON.stringify(userInfo))\r\n\r\n      toast({\r\n        title: \"登录成功\",\r\n        description: \"欢迎回到管理后台\",\r\n      })\r\n\r\n      // 关闭对话框并跳转\r\n      setOpen(false)\r\n      router.push(\"/admin\")\r\n    }",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\nexport function AdminLoginDialog() {\r\n  const router = useRouter()\r\n  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false)\r\n  const [username, setUsername] = useState(\"\")\r\n  const [password, setPassword] = useState(\"\")\r\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false)\r\n\r\n  const handleLogin = async (e: React.FormEvent) =\u003e {\r\n    e.preventDefault()\r\n\r\n    if (!username || !password) {\r\n      toast({\r\n        title: \"错误\",\r\n        description: \"请填写用户名和密码\",\r\n        variant: \"destructive\",\r\n      })\r\n      return\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    try {\r\n      setLoading(true)\r\n      const response = await userApi.login({ username, password })\r\n\r\n      // 使用类型断言确保响应数据符合预期类型\r\n      const responseData = response.data as ApiResponse\u003cLoginResponse\u003e\r\n      const userData = responseData.data\r\n\r\n      // 检查用户角色\r\n      if (userData.role !== \"admin\") {\r\n        toast({\r\n          title: \"无权限\",\r\n          description: \"只有管理员账号才能登录管理后台\",\r\n          variant: \"destructive\",\r\n        })\r\n        setLoading(false)\r\n        return\r\n      }\r\n\r\n      // 保存token和用户信息到localStorage\r\n      localStorage.setItem(\"token\", userData.token)\r\n      localStorage.setItem(\"userId\", userData.userId.toString())\r\n      localStorage.setItem(\"userName\", userData.name)\r\n      localStorage.setItem(\"userRole\", userData.role)\r\n      \r\n      // 保存userInfo对象\r\n      const userInfo = {\r\n        id: userData.userId,\r\n        name: userData.name,\r\n        role: userData.role,\r\n        memberNumber: userData.memberNumber || \"\",\r\n      }\r\n      localStorage.setItem(\"userInfo\", JSON.stringify(userInfo))\r\n\r\n      toast({\r\n        title: \"登录成功\",\r\n        description: \"欢迎回到管理后台\",\r\n      })\r\n\r\n      // 关闭对话框并跳转\r\n      setOpen(false)\r\n      router.push(\"/admin\")\r\n    }",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\"use client\";\r\n\r\nimport Link from \"next/link\";\r\nimport { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\r\nimport { useState, useEffect } from \"react\";\r\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\";\r\nimport { LogOut, Menu, X } from \"lucide-react\";\r\nimport { \r\n  DropdownMenu, \r\n  DropdownMenuContent, \r\n  DropdownMenuItem, \r\n  DropdownMenuTrigger \r\n} from \"@/components/ui/dropdown-menu\";\r\nimport { toast } from \"@/components/ui/use-toast\";\r\n\r\nexport default function Navbar() {\r\n  const router = useRouter();\r\n  const [userName, setUserName] = useState\u003cstring | null\u003e(null);\r\n  const [userRole, setUserRole] = useState\u003cstring | null\u003e(null);\r\n  const [isLoggedIn, setIsLoggedIn] = useState(false);\r\n  const [isMobileMenuOpen, setIsMobileMenuOpen] = useState(false);\r\n\r\n  // 在组件加载时，检查用户登录状态\r\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\r\n    const checkLoginStatus = () =\u003e {\r\n      const storedToken = localStorage.getItem(\"token\");\r\n      const storedUserName = localStorage.getItem(\"userName\");\r\n      const storedUserRole = localStorage.getItem(\"userRole\");\r\n      \r\n      // 只有在同时存在token和用户名的情况下才视为已登录\r\n      if (storedToken \u0026\u0026 storedUserName) {\r\n        setUserName(storedUserName);\r\n        setUserRole(storedUserRole);\r\n        setIsLoggedIn(true);\r\n      } else {\r\n        // 如果缺少必要信息，清除所有存储的用户数据\r\n        localStorage.removeItem(\"token\");\r\n        localStorage.removeItem(\"userId\");\r\n        localStorage.removeItem(\"userName\");\r\n        localStorage.removeItem(\"userRole\");\r\n        localStorage.removeItem(\"userInfo\");\r\n        \r\n        setIsLoggedIn(false);\r\n        setUserName(null);\r\n        setUserRole(null);\r\n      }\r\n    };\r\n    \r\n    // 初始检查\r\n    checkLoginStatus();\r\n    \r\n    // 监听storage事件，当其他标签页修改localStorage时更新状态\r\n    window.addEventListener(\"storage\", checkLoginStatus);\r\n    \r\n    return () =\u003e {\r\n      window.removeEventListener(\"storage\", checkLoginStatus);\r\n    };\r\n  }, []);",

        "originalContents": "\"use client\";\r\n\r\nimport Link from \"next/link\";\r\nimport { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\r\nimport { useState, useEffect } from \"react\";\r\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\";\r\nimport { LogOut, Menu, X } from \"lucide-react\";\r\nimport { \r\n  DropdownMenu, \r\n  DropdownMenuContent, \r\n  DropdownMenuItem, \r\n  DropdownMenuTrigger \r\n} from \"@/components/ui/dropdown-menu\";\r\nimport { toast } from \"@/components/ui/use-toast\";\r\n\r\nexport default function Navbar() {\r\n  const router = useRouter();\r\n  const [userName, setUserName] = useState\u003cstring | null\u003e(null);\r\n  const [userRole, setUserRole] = useState\u003cstring | null\u003e(null);\r\n  const [isLoggedIn, setIsLoggedIn] = useState(false);\r\n  const [isMobileMenuOpen, setIsMobileMenuOpen] = useState(false);\r\n\r\n  // 在组件加载时，检查用户登录状态\r\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\r\n    const checkLoginStatus = () =\u003e {\r\n      const storedToken = localStorage.getItem(\"token\");\r\n      const storedUserName = localStorage.getItem(\"userName\");\r\n      const storedUserRole = localStorage.getItem(\"userRole\");\r\n      \r\n      // 只有在同时存在token和用户名的情况下才视为已登录\r\n      if (storedToken \u0026\u0026 storedUserName) {\r\n        setUserName(storedUserName);\r\n        setUserRole(storedUserRole);\r\n        setIsLoggedIn(true);\r\n      } else {\r\n        // 如果缺少必要信息，清除所有存储的用户数据\r\n        localStorage.removeItem(\"token\");\r\n        localStorage.removeItem(\"userId\");\r\n        localStorage.removeItem(\"userName\");\r\n        localStorage.removeItem(\"userRole\");\r\n        localStorage.removeItem(\"userInfo\");\r\n        \r\n        setIsLoggedIn(false);\r\n        setUserName(null);\r\n        setUserRole(null);\r\n      }\r\n    };\r\n    \r\n    // 初始检查\r\n    checkLoginStatus();\r\n    \r\n    // 监听storage事件，当其他标签页修改localStorage时更新状态\r\n    window.addEventListener(\"storage\", checkLoginStatus);\r\n    \r\n    return () =\u003e {\r\n      window.removeEventListener(\"storage\", checkLoginStatus);\r\n    };\r\n  }, []);",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.controller;\r\n\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.core.conditions.query.QueryWrapper;\r\nimport com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.plugins.pagination.Page;\r\nimport com.example.demo.pojo.Users;\r\nimport com.example.demo.security.RequiresRoles;\r\nimport com.example.demo.security.UserRole;\r\nimport com.example.demo.service.UsersService;\r\nimport com.example.demo.utils.JwtUtil;\r\nimport com.example.demo.utils.PasswordUtil;\r\nimport com.example.demo.utils.Result;\r\nimport org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;\r\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.*;\r\n\r\nimport javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;\r\nimport java.util.Date;\r\nimport java.util.HashMap;\r\nimport java.util.List;\r\nimport java.util.Map;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * \u003cp\u003e\r\n * 用户表 前端控制器\r\n * \u003c/p\u003e\r\n *\r\n * @author Zina\r\n * @since 2025-05-08\r\n */",

        "contents": "package com.example.demo.security;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.utils.Result;\r\nimport com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper;\r\nimport org.springframework.security.core.AuthenticationException;\r\nimport org.springframework.security.web.AuthenticationEntryPoint;\r\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Component;\r\n\r\nimport javax.servlet.ServletException;\r\nimport javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;\r\nimport javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse;\r\nimport java.io.IOException;\r\nimport java.io.PrintWriter;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * JWT认证失败处理类\r\n * 当用户未登录或token过期时，自定义返回结果\r\n */\r\n@Component\r\npublic class JwtAuthenticationEntryPoint implements AuthenticationEntryPoint {\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    public void commence(HttpServletRequest request, HttpServletResponse response, AuthenticationException authException) \r\n            throws IOException, ServletException {\r\n        \r\n        response.setCharacterEncoding(\"UTF-8\");\r\n        response.setContentType(\"application/json\");\r\n        \r\n        Result\u003cString\u003e result = Result.unauthorized();\r\n        \r\n        PrintWriter writer = response.getWriter();\r\n        writer.write(new ObjectMapper().writeValueAsString(result));\r\n        writer.flush();\r\n        writer.close();\r\n    }\r\n}",

        "originalContents": "package com.example.demo.security;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.utils.Result;\r\nimport com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper;\r\nimport org.springframework.security.core.AuthenticationException;\r\nimport org.springframework.security.web.AuthenticationEntryPoint;\r\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Component;\r\n\r\nimport javax.servlet.ServletException;\r\nimport javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;\r\nimport javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse;\r\nimport java.io.IOException;\r\nimport java.io.PrintWriter;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * JWT认证失败处理类\r\n * 当用户未登录或token过期时，自定义返回结果\r\n */\r\n@Component\r\npublic class JwtAuthenticationEntryPoint implements AuthenticationEntryPoint {\r\n    \r\n    @Override\r\n    public void commence(HttpServletRequest request, HttpServletResponse response, AuthenticationException authException) \r\n            throws IOException, ServletException {\r\n        \r\n        response.setCharacterEncoding(\"UTF-8\");\r\n        response.setContentType(\"application/json\");\r\n        \r\n        Result\u003cString\u003e result = Result.unauthorized();\r\n        \r\n        PrintWriter writer = response.getWriter();\r\n        writer.write(new ObjectMapper().writeValueAsString(result));\r\n        writer.flush();\r\n        writer.close();\r\n    }\r\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n@Aspect\r\n@Component\r\npublic class RoleCheckAspect {\r\n    \r\n    @Autowired\r\n    private com.example.demo.utils.JwtUtil jwtUtil;\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 环绕通知：拦截带有RequiresRoles注解的方法\r\n     * @param joinPoint 切点\r\n     * @return 方法执行结果\r\n     * @throws Throwable 可能抛出的异常\r\n     */\r\n    @Around(\"@annotation(com.example.demo.security.RequiresRoles) || @within(com.example.demo.security.RequiresRoles)\")\r\n    public Object checkRole(ProceedingJoinPoint joinPoint) throws Throwable {\r\n        // 获取当前请求\r\n        ServletRequestAttributes attributes = (ServletRequestAttributes) RequestContextHolder.getRequestAttributes();\r\n        HttpServletRequest request = attributes.getRequest();\r\n        \r\n        // 获取当前用户角色\r\n        String role = getCurrentUserRole(request);\r\n        \r\n        // 如果未获取到角色，说明用户未登录\r\n        if (role == null) {\r\n            throw new UnauthorizedException(\"未登录或登录已过期，请重新登录\");\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 获取目标方法上的RequiresRoles注解\r\n        MethodSignature signature = (MethodSignature) joinPoint.getSignature();\r\n        Method method = signature.getMethod();\r\n        \r\n        // 优先检查方法上的注解\r\n        RequiresRoles methodRequiresRoles = method.getAnnotation(RequiresRoles.class);\r\n        \r\n        // 如果方法上没有，则检查类上的注解\r\n        RequiresRoles classRequiresRoles = null;\r\n        if (methodRequiresRoles == null) {\r\n            classRequiresRoles = method.getDeclaringClass().getAnnotation(RequiresRoles.class);\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 合并获取需要的角色\r\n        RequiresRoles requiresRoles = methodRequiresRoles != null ? methodRequiresRoles : classRequiresRoles;\r\n        \r\n        // 如果没有RequiresRoles注解，直接放行\r\n        if (requiresRoles == null) {\r\n            return joinPoint.proceed();\r\n        }",

            "text": "\r"

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,

          },

            "text": "        // 如果方法上没有，则检查类上的注解\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "        if (methodRequiresRoles == null) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "            classRequiresRoles = method.getDeclaringClass().getAnnotation(RequiresRoles.class);\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 62,

          },

            "lineNumber": 63,

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,

            "lineNumber": 67,

          },

          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "        }"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n@Aspect\r\n@Component\r\npublic class RoleCheckAspect {\r\n    \r\n    @Autowired\r\n    private com.example.demo.utils.JwtUtil jwtUtil;\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 环绕通知：拦截带有RequiresRoles注解的方法\r\n     * @param joinPoint 切点\r\n     * @return 方法执行结果\r\n     * @throws Throwable 可能抛出的异常\r\n     */\r\n    @Around(\"@annotation(com.example.demo.security.RequiresRoles) || @within(com.example.demo.security.RequiresRoles)\")\r\n    public Object checkRole(ProceedingJoinPoint joinPoint) throws Throwable {\r\n        // 获取当前请求\r\n        ServletRequestAttributes attributes = (ServletRequestAttributes) RequestContextHolder.getRequestAttributes();\r\n        HttpServletRequest request = attributes.getRequest();\r\n        \r\n        // 获取当前用户角色\r\n        String role = getCurrentUserRole(request);\r\n        \r\n        // 如果未获取到角色，说明用户未登录\r\n        if (role == null) {\r\n            throw new UnauthorizedException(\"未登录或登录已过期，请重新登录\");\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 获取目标方法上的RequiresRoles注解\r\n        MethodSignature signature = (MethodSignature) joinPoint.getSignature();\r\n        Method method = signature.getMethod();\r\n        \r\n        // 优先检查方法上的注解\r\n        RequiresRoles methodRequiresRoles = method.getAnnotation(RequiresRoles.class);\r\n        \r\n        // 如果方法上没有，则检查类上的注解\r\n        RequiresRoles classRequiresRoles = null;\r\n        if (methodRequiresRoles == null) {\r\n            classRequiresRoles = method.getDeclaringClass().getAnnotation(RequiresRoles.class);\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 合并获取需要的角色\r\n        RequiresRoles requiresRoles = methodRequiresRoles != null ? methodRequiresRoles : classRequiresRoles;\r\n        \r\n        // 如果没有RequiresRoles注解，直接放行\r\n        if (requiresRoles == null) {\r\n            return joinPoint.proceed();\r\n        }",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 10,
            "line": 70
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 4,
            "line": 23
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "zina-tch/src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/RoleCheckAspect.java"
      },
      "score": 0.4355469048023224
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n        \r\n        // 检查用户角色是否满足要求\r\n        String[] requiredRoles = requiresRoles.value();\r\n        boolean hasPermission = false;\r\n        \r\n        // 判断逻辑类型\r\n        if (requiresRoles.logical() == RequiresRoles.Logical.OR) {\r\n            // OR逻辑：用户拥有任一所需角色即可\r\n            hasPermission = Arrays.stream(requiredRoles)\r\n                    .anyMatch(requiredRole -\u003e requiredRole.equals(role));\r\n        } else {\r\n            // AND逻辑：用户必须拥有所有所需角色\r\n            hasPermission = Arrays.stream(requiredRoles)\r\n                    .allMatch(requiredRole -\u003e requiredRole.equals(role));\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 如果没有权限，抛出异常\r\n        if (!hasPermission) {\r\n            throw new UnauthorizedException();\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 有权限，执行原方法\r\n        return joinPoint.proceed();\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 获取当前用户角色\r\n     * @param request HTTP请求\r\n     * @return 用户角色\r\n     */\r\n    private String getCurrentUserRole(HttpServletRequest request) {\r\n        // 1. 首先从Security上下文中获取\r\n        Authentication authentication = SecurityContextHolder.getContext().getAuthentication();\r\n        if (authentication != null \u0026\u0026 authentication.isAuthenticated()) {\r\n            // 从用户名中解析角色，假设格式为：\"username:role\"\r\n            String principal = authentication.getName();\r\n            if (principal.contains(\":\")) {\r\n                return principal.split(\":\")[1];\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 2. 如果Security上下文中没有，则从JWT令牌中获取\r\n        String jwt = getJwtFromRequest(request);\r\n        if (StringUtils.hasText(jwt) \u0026\u0026 jwtUtil.validateToken(jwt)) {\r\n            Claims claims = jwtUtil.parseToken(jwt);\r\n            return (String) claims.get(\"role\");\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return null;\r\n    }",

        "originalContents": "\r\n        \r\n        // 检查用户角色是否满足要求\r\n        String[] requiredRoles = requiresRoles.value();\r\n        boolean hasPermission = false;\r\n        \r\n        // 判断逻辑类型\r\n        if (requiresRoles.logical() == RequiresRoles.Logical.OR) {\r\n            // OR逻辑：用户拥有任一所需角色即可\r\n            hasPermission = Arrays.stream(requiredRoles)\r\n                    .anyMatch(requiredRole -\u003e requiredRole.equals(role));\r\n        } else {\r\n            // AND逻辑：用户必须拥有所有所需角色\r\n            hasPermission = Arrays.stream(requiredRoles)\r\n                    .allMatch(requiredRole -\u003e requiredRole.equals(role));\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 如果没有权限，抛出异常\r\n        if (!hasPermission) {\r\n            throw new UnauthorizedException();\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 有权限，执行原方法\r\n        return joinPoint.proceed();\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 获取当前用户角色\r\n     * @param request HTTP请求\r\n     * @return 用户角色\r\n     */\r\n    private String getCurrentUserRole(HttpServletRequest request) {\r\n        // 1. 首先从Security上下文中获取\r\n        Authentication authentication = SecurityContextHolder.getContext().getAuthentication();\r\n        if (authentication != null \u0026\u0026 authentication.isAuthenticated()) {\r\n            // 从用户名中解析角色，假设格式为：\"username:role\"\r\n            String principal = authentication.getName();\r\n            if (principal.contains(\":\")) {\r\n                return principal.split(\":\")[1];\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // 2. 如果Security上下文中没有，则从JWT令牌中获取\r\n        String jwt = getJwtFromRequest(request);\r\n        if (StringUtils.hasText(jwt) \u0026\u0026 jwtUtil.validateToken(jwt)) {\r\n            Claims claims = jwtUtil.parseToken(jwt);\r\n            return (String) claims.get(\"role\");\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return null;\r\n    }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\nexport default function NavBar() {\r\n    const [isLoggedIn, setIsLoggedIn] = useState(false)\r\n    const [userName, setUserName] = useState(\"\")\r\n    const [userRole, setUserRole] = useState\u003cstring | null\u003e(null)\r\n\r\n    // 在客户端加载时检查用户登录状态\r\n    useEffect(() =\u003e {\r\n        // 首先尝试从userInfo对象获取用户信息\r\n        const userInfoStr = localStorage.getItem(\"userInfo\")\r\n        if (userInfoStr) {\r\n            try {\r\n                const userInfo = JSON.parse(userInfoStr) as LocalUserInfo\r\n                setIsLoggedIn(true)\r\n                setUserName(userInfo.name || \"用户\")\r\n                setUserRole(userInfo.role)\r\n                return\r\n            } catch (e) {\r\n                console.error(\"解析用户信息失败\", e)\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 如果没有userInfo对象，尝试从单独的字段获取\r\n        const userName = localStorage.getItem(\"userName\")\r\n        const userId = localStorage.getItem(\"userId\")\r\n        const userRole = localStorage.getItem(\"userRole\")\r\n\r\n        if (userName \u0026\u0026 userId) {\r\n            setIsLoggedIn(true)\r\n            setUserName(userName)\r\n            setUserRole(userRole)\r\n        }\r\n    }, [])\r\n\r\n    // 处理登出\r\n    const handleLogout = () =\u003e {\r\n        // 清除所有可能的用户信息存储\r\n        localStorage.removeItem(\"userInfo\")\r\n        localStorage.removeItem(\"token\")\r\n        localStorage.removeItem(\"userId\")\r\n        localStorage.removeItem(\"userName\")\r\n        localStorage.removeItem(\"userRole\")\r\n\r\n        setIsLoggedIn(false)\r\n        setUserName(\"\")\r\n        setUserRole(null)\r\n        window.location.href = \"/\"\r\n    }",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\nexport default function NavBar() {\r\n    const [isLoggedIn, setIsLoggedIn] = useState(false)\r\n    const [userName, setUserName] = useState(\"\")\r\n    const [userRole, setUserRole] = useState\u003cstring | null\u003e(null)\r\n\r\n    // 在客户端加载时检查用户登录状态\r\n    useEffect(() =\u003e {\r\n        // 首先尝试从userInfo对象获取用户信息\r\n        const userInfoStr = localStorage.getItem(\"userInfo\")\r\n        if (userInfoStr) {\r\n            try {\r\n                const userInfo = JSON.parse(userInfoStr) as LocalUserInfo\r\n                setIsLoggedIn(true)\r\n                setUserName(userInfo.name || \"用户\")\r\n                setUserRole(userInfo.role)\r\n                return\r\n            } catch (e) {\r\n                console.error(\"解析用户信息失败\", e)\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        // 如果没有userInfo对象，尝试从单独的字段获取\r\n        const userName = localStorage.getItem(\"userName\")\r\n        const userId = localStorage.getItem(\"userId\")\r\n        const userRole = localStorage.getItem(\"userRole\")\r\n\r\n        if (userName \u0026\u0026 userId) {\r\n            setIsLoggedIn(true)\r\n            setUserName(userName)\r\n            setUserRole(userRole)\r\n        }\r\n    }, [])\r\n\r\n    // 处理登出\r\n    const handleLogout = () =\u003e {\r\n        // 清除所有可能的用户信息存储\r\n        localStorage.removeItem(\"userInfo\")\r\n        localStorage.removeItem(\"token\")\r\n        localStorage.removeItem(\"userId\")\r\n        localStorage.removeItem(\"userName\")\r\n        localStorage.removeItem(\"userRole\")\r\n\r\n        setIsLoggedIn(false)\r\n        setUserName(\"\")\r\n        setUserRole(null)\r\n        window.location.href = \"/\"\r\n    }",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import axios from 'axios';\r\n\r\n// 创建axios实例\r\nconst api = axios.create({\r\n  baseURL: process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL || 'http://localhost:8090',\r\n  headers: {\r\n    'Content-Type': 'application/json',\r\n  },\r\n  withCredentials: true, // 允许发送cookies\r\n});\r\n\r\n// 请求拦截器\r\napi.interceptors.request.use(\r\n  (config) =\u003e {\r\n    // 从localStorage获取token（客户端）\r\n    if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {\r\n      const token = localStorage.getItem('token');\r\n      if (token) {\r\n        config.headers.Authorization = &#96;Bearer ${token}&#96;;\r\n      }\r\n    }\r\n    return config;\r\n  },\r\n  (error) =\u003e {\r\n    return Promise.reject(error);\r\n  }\r\n);",

        "originalContents": "import axios from 'axios';\r\n\r\n// 创建axios实例\r\nconst api = axios.create({\r\n  baseURL: process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL || 'http://localhost:8090',\r\n  headers: {\r\n    'Content-Type': 'application/json',\r\n  },\r\n  withCredentials: true, // 允许发送cookies\r\n});\r\n\r\n// 请求拦截器\r\napi.interceptors.request.use(\r\n  (config) =\u003e {\r\n    // 从localStorage获取token（客户端）\r\n    if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {\r\n      const token = localStorage.getItem('token');\r\n      if (token) {\r\n        config.headers.Authorization = &#96;Bearer ${token}&#96;;\r\n      }\r\n    }\r\n    return config;\r\n  },\r\n  (error) =\u003e {\r\n    return Promise.reject(error);\r\n  }\r\n);",
        "range": {

            "line": 27

            "column": 1,

        "relativeWorkspacePath": "medical-training/lib/api.ts"

      "score": 0.4316405951976776
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nexport default function LoginPage() {\n  const router = useRouter()\n  const searchParams = useSearchParams()\n  const { login, isAuthenticated } = useAuth()\n  const [username, setUsername] = useState(\"\")\n  const [password, setPassword] = useState(\"\")\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false)\n\n  // 重定向路径（如果有的话）\n  const redirect = searchParams.get(\"redirect\") || \"/\"\n\n  // 如果已登录，直接重定向\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (isAuthenticated) {\n      router.push(redirect)\n    }\n  }, [isAuthenticated, router, redirect])\n\n  const handleLogin = async (e: React.FormEvent) =\u003e {\n    e.preventDefault()\n\n    if (!username || !password) {\n      toast({\n        title: \"错误\",\n        description: \"请填写用户名和密码\",\n        variant: \"destructive\",\n      })\n      return\n    }\n\n    try {\n      setLoading(true)\n      const response = await userApi.login({ username, password })\n\n      // 使用类型断言确保响应数据符合预期类型\n      const responseData = response.data as ApiResponse\u003cLoginResponse\u003e\n      const userData = responseData.data\n\n      // 使用AuthContext登录\n      login(userData.token, {\n        id: userData.userId,\n        name: userData.name,\n        role: userData.role,\n        memberNumber: userData.memberNumber || \"\",\n      })\n\n      toast({\n        title: \"登录成功\",\n        description: \"欢迎回到医学培训系统\",\n      })\n\n      // 根据角色导航到不同页面或返回到请求的重定向页\n      router.push(redirect)\n    } catch (error: any) {\n      toast({\n        title: \"登录失败\",\n        description: error.response?.data?.message || \"用户名或密码错误\",\n        variant: \"destructive\",\n      })\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false)\n    }\n  }",

        "originalContents": "\n\nexport default function LoginPage() {\n  const router = useRouter()\n  const searchParams = useSearchParams()\n  const { login, isAuthenticated } = useAuth()\n  const [username, setUsername] = useState(\"\")\n  const [password, setPassword] = useState(\"\")\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false)\n\n  // 重定向路径（如果有的话）\n  const redirect = searchParams.get(\"redirect\") || \"/\"\n\n  // 如果已登录，直接重定向\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (isAuthenticated) {\n      router.push(redirect)\n    }\n  }, [isAuthenticated, router, redirect])\n\n  const handleLogin = async (e: React.FormEvent) =\u003e {\n    e.preventDefault()\n\n    if (!username || !password) {\n      toast({\n        title: \"错误\",\n        description: \"请填写用户名和密码\",\n        variant: \"destructive\",\n      })\n      return\n    }\n\n    try {\n      setLoading(true)\n      const response = await userApi.login({ username, password })\n\n      // 使用类型断言确保响应数据符合预期类型\n      const responseData = response.data as ApiResponse\u003cLoginResponse\u003e\n      const userData = responseData.data\n\n      // 使用AuthContext登录\n      login(userData.token, {\n        id: userData.userId,\n        name: userData.name,\n        role: userData.role,\n        memberNumber: userData.memberNumber || \"\",\n      })\n\n      toast({\n        title: \"登录成功\",\n        description: \"欢迎回到医学培训系统\",\n      })\n\n      // 根据角色导航到不同页面或返回到请求的重定向页\n      router.push(redirect)\n    } catch (error: any) {\n      toast({\n        title: \"登录失败\",\n        description: error.response?.data?.message || \"用户名或密码错误\",\n        variant: \"destructive\",\n      })\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false)\n    }\n  }",
        "range": {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n// 响应拦截器\r\napi.interceptors.response.use(\r\n  (response) =\u003e response,\r\n  (error) =\u003e {\r\n    if (error.response?.status === 401) {\r\n      // 处理未授权错误\r\n      if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {\r\n        localStorage.removeItem('token');\r\n        window.location.href = '/login';\r\n      }\r\n    }\r\n    return Promise.reject(error);\r\n  }\r\n);",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n// 登录响应类型\r\nexport interface LoginResponse {\r\n  token: string;\r\n  userId: number;\r\n  name: string;\r\n  role: string;\r\n  memberNumber?: string;\r\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "package com.example.demo.config;\r\n\r\nimport com.example.demo.security.JwtAuthenticationFilter;\r\nimport com.example.demo.security.JwtAuthenticationEntryPoint;\r\nimport org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;\r\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Bean;\r\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration;\r\nimport org.springframework.security.config.annotation.web.builders.HttpSecurity;\r\nimport org.springframework.security.config.annotation.web.configuration.EnableWebSecurity;\r\nimport org.springframework.security.config.annotation.web.configuration.WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter;\r\nimport org.springframework.security.config.http.SessionCreationPolicy;\r\nimport org.springframework.security.crypto.bcrypt.BCryptPasswordEncoder;\r\nimport org.springframework.security.web.authentication.UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter;\r\nimport org.springframework.web.cors.CorsConfiguration;\r\nimport org.springframework.web.cors.CorsConfigurationSource;\r\nimport org.springframework.web.cors.UrlBasedCorsConfigurationSource;\r\n\r\nimport java.util.Arrays;\r\nimport java.util.Collections;\r\n\r\n/**\r\n * Spring Security 配置类\r\n */",

_**Agent**_

你的项目后端和前端鉴权方式如下：

---

## 1. 鉴权方式分析

### 后端（Spring Boot）
- **登录/注册**接口返回 JWT Token，token中包含用户id、name、role。
- 认证用 JWT，前端每次请求需带 `Authorization: Bearer <token>`。
- 有自定义的 `JwtAuthenticationFilter` 负责解析和校验 token，并将用户信息注入 Spring Security 上下文。
- 角色控制可通过注解（如 `@RequiresRoles`）或在 Controller 里手动判断。

### 前端（Next.js）
- 登录后将 token 和用户信息存入 localStorage。
- 请求时 axios 拦截器自动加上 `Authorization` 头。
- 用户信息通过 context 或 localStorage 读取。
- 401 自动跳转登录页。

---

## 2. 视频权限功能实现方案

### 后端接口实现

你需要在视频详情接口（如 `/api/videos/{id}`）中增加如下逻辑：

- 如果视频 `accessType == "internal"`（仅会员），且用户角色为 `user`，则返回 403。
- 其他角色（如 vip、admin）可正常访问。

**示例代码：**

```java
@RestController
@RequestMapping("/api/videos")
public class VideoController {

    @Autowired
    private VideoService videoService;

    @Autowired
    private JwtUtil jwtUtil;

    @GetMapping("/{id}")
    public ResponseEntity<?> getVideo(@PathVariable Integer id, HttpServletRequest request) {
        Videos video = videoService.getById(id);

        // 公开视频直接返回
        if (!"internal".equals(video.getAccessType())) {
            return ResponseEntity.ok(video);
        }

        // 会员视频，校验token
        String authHeader = request.getHeader("Authorization");
        if (authHeader == null || !authHeader.startsWith("Bearer ")) {
            return ResponseEntity.status(HttpStatus.UNAUTHORIZED).body("请先登录");
        }
        String token = authHeader.substring(7);
        if (!jwtUtil.validateToken(token)) {
            return ResponseEntity.status(HttpStatus.UNAUTHORIZED).body("登录已过期，请重新登录");
        }
        String role = (String) jwtUtil.parseToken(token).get("role");
        if ("user".equals(role)) {
            return ResponseEntity.status(HttpStatus.FORBIDDEN).body("仅会员可观看该视频");
        }
        return ResponseEntity.ok(video);
    }
}
```

---

### 前端页面实现

#### 1. 视频播放页 `/app/video/[id]/page.tsx`

- 请求 `/api/videos/{id}`，如果返回 403，提示“仅会员可观看”；如果 401，跳转登录页。

**示例代码片段：**

```tsx
'use client'
import { useEffect, useState } from 'react'
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation'

export default function VideoPage({ params }) {
  const [video, setVideo] = useState(null)
  const [error, setError] = useState('')
  const router = useRouter()

  useEffect(() => {
    fetch(`/api/videos/${params.id}`, {
      headers: {
        Authorization: `Bearer ${localStorage.getItem('token') || ''}`,
      }
    })
      .then(async res => {
        if (res.status === 401) {
          router.push('/login')
          return
        }
        if (res.status === 403) {
          const msg = await res.text()
          setError(msg)
          return
        }
        return res.json()
      })
      .then(data => {
        if (data) setVideo(data)
      })
      .catch(err => setError('加载失败'))
  }, [params.id, router])

  if (error) return <div style={{ color: 'red' }}>{error}</div>
  if (!video) return <div>加载中...</div>

  return (
    <div>
      <h1>{video.title}</h1>
      <video src={video.videoUrl} controls width="800" />
      {/* 其他信息 */}
    </div>
  )
}
```

#### 2. 管理端页面 `/app/admin/videos/`  
无需做会员校验，正常展示和管理视频即可。

---

## 3. 你需要做的文件修改

- **后端**：完善 `/api/videos/{id}` 接口，增加会员权限判断。
- **前端**：在 `/app/video/[id]/page.tsx` 处理 401/403 响应，给出友好提示或跳转。

---

重新实现我现在只需要你对医疗设备操作指南这个视频内容实现 权限的功能 实现思路可以为 当我访问 这个http://localhost:3000/courses/3路径时候如过是user则不能访问 如果是其他则可以访问

_**Agent (2025-05-18 10:20:39Z)**_

明白！你只需要对“医疗设备操作指南”这个视频（id=2）实现专属的权限控制功能：

- 访问 `/courses/3`（即视频id=2）时，如果用户角色是 user，则禁止访问（前端显示无权限）。
- 其他角色（如 vip、admin）可以访问。

下面是最简明的后端+前端实现方案：

---

## 一、后端实现（只针对id=2做权限）

在 `VideosController.java` 新增专用接口：

```java
@GetMapping("/special/2")
public ApiResponse<Videos> getMedicalDeviceVideo(@RequestHeader(value = "Authorization", required = false) String authHeader) {
    Videos video = videosService.getById(2);
    if (video == null) {
        return ApiResponse.badRequest("视频不存在");
    }
    // 只对id=2做权限控制
    if (authHeader == null || !authHeader.startsWith("Bearer ")) {
        return ApiResponse.unauthorized("请先登录");
    }
    String token = authHeader.substring(7);
    if (!jwtUtil.validateToken(token)) {
        return ApiResponse.unauthorized("登录已过期，请重新登录");
    }
    String role = (String) jwtUtil.parseToken(token).get("role");
    if ("user".equals(role)) {
        return ApiResponse.forbidden("仅会员可观看该视频");
    }
    return ApiResponse.success(video);
}
```

---

## 二、前端实现（/courses/3页面）

在 `/app/courses/[id]/page.tsx`（或对应的页面）中：

```tsx
'use client'
import { useEffect, useState } from 'react'
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation'

export default function CoursePage({ params }) {
  const [video, setVideo] = useState(null)
  const [error, setError] = useState('')
  const router = useRouter()

  useEffect(() => {
    // 只对id=3（数据库id=2）做特殊处理
    if (params.id === '3') {
      fetch('http://localhost:8090/api/videos/special/2', {
        headers: {
          Authorization: `Bearer ${localStorage.getItem('token') || ''}`,
        }
      })
        .then(async res => {
          if (res.status === 401) {
            router.push('/login')
            return
          }
          if (res.status === 403) {
            const msg = await res.text()
            setError(msg)
            return
          }
          return res.json()
        })
        .then(data => {
          if (data) setVideo(data.data)
        })
        .catch(() => setError('加载失败'))
    }
  }, [params.id, router])

  if (error) return <div style={{ color: 'red' }}>{error}</div>
  if (!video) return <div>加载中...</div>

  return (
    <div>
      <h1>{video.title}</h1>
      <video src={video.videoUrl} controls width="800" />
      {/* 其他信息 */}
    </div>
  )
}
```

---

## 总结

- 只对“医疗设备操作指南”视频（id=2）做权限控制，其他视频不受影响。
- user 角色访问 `/courses/3` 时会被禁止，其他角色可正常访问。
- 你可以根据实际路由和API路径微调上述代码。

如需直接插入到你的项目或有其他特殊需求，请告知！

这是我的数据库视频表的权限字段 你看能否实现如果为internal类型 则用户的角色为user则不可访问对应的http://localhost:3000/courses/[id]页面

_**Agent (2025-05-18 10:20:39Z)**_

你的数据库设计完全可以实现你说的功能！  
**只要 access_type 字段为 internal，且用户角色为 user，就禁止访问 `/courses/[id]` 页面。**

实现思路如下：

---

## 1. 后端接口实现

你只需要在视频详情接口中加一段判断：

- 查询视频 access_type 字段
- 如果是 internal，再判断用户角色
- user 角色禁止访问，其他角色允许

**示例代码（推荐直接替换你的视频详情接口）：**

```java
@GetMapping("/secure/{id}")
public ApiResponse<Videos> getVideoWithAuth(@PathVariable Integer id, @RequestHeader(value = "Authorization", required = false) String authHeader) {
    Videos video = videosService.getById(id);
    if (video == null) {
        return ApiResponse.badRequest("视频不存在");
    }
    // 公开视频直接返回
    if (!"internal".equals(video.getAccessType())) {
        return ApiResponse.success(video);
    }
    // 会员视频，校验token
    if (authHeader == null || !authHeader.startsWith("Bearer ")) {
        return ApiResponse.unauthorized("请先登录");
    }
    String token = authHeader.substring(7);
    if (!jwtUtil.validateToken(token)) {
        return ApiResponse.unauthorized("登录已过期，请重新登录");
    }
    String role = (String) jwtUtil.parseToken(token).get("role");
    if ("user".equals(role)) {
        return ApiResponse.forbidden("仅会员可观看该视频");
    }
    return ApiResponse.success(video);
}
```

---

## 2. 前端页面实现

在 `/courses/[id]` 页面请求 `/api/videos/secure/[id]`，根据返回的 401/403 做提示或跳转。

**示例代码：**

```tsx
'use client'
import { useEffect, useState } from 'react'
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation'

export default function CoursePage({ params }) {
  const [video, setVideo] = useState(null)
  const [error, setError] = useState('')
  const router = useRouter()

  useEffect(() => {
    fetch(`http://localhost:8090/api/videos/secure/${params.id}`, {
      headers: {
        Authorization: `Bearer ${localStorage.getItem('token') || ''}`,
      }
    })
      .then(async res => {
        if (res.status === 401) {
          router.push('/login')
          return
        }
        if (res.status === 403) {
          const msg = await res.text()
          setError(msg)
          return
        }
        return res.json()
      })
      .then(data => {
        if (data) setVideo(data.data)
      })
      .catch(() => setError('加载失败'))
  }, [params.id, router])

  if (error) return <div style={{ color: 'red' }}>{error}</div>
  if (!video) return <div>加载中...</div>

  return (
    <div>
      <h1>{video.title}</h1>
      <video src={video.videoUrl} controls width="800" />
      {/* 其他信息 */}
    </div>
  )
}
```

---

## 3. 总结

- 数据库 access_type 字段已能区分会员视频
- 后端接口根据 access_type 和用户角色判断权限
- 前端根据接口返回的 401/403 做友好提示

这样就能实现你要的“internal+user不能访问，其他都能访问”的功能！

如需具体文件修改或有其他细节需求，随时告诉我！
